[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111111111 a
1 111111111 a
2 111111111 a
3 111111111 a
4 111111111 a
5 111111111 a
6 111111111 a
7 111111111 a

70 07 110111011 7
